author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: dear David, I'm afraid not and i don't have any plans to make any either. I am pretty involved in my graphene research at the moment and it's a bit of a tough nut to crack and is taking all my spare time - but good luck with your build and let me know how yo get - post a vid too - i'd love to see what you make - rob.
